_meta.instrument: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson — 한국어 번역
_meta.full_name: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson (Korean translation)
_meta.reuse_notes: 한국어 번역(파생물). 비상업 1단계용. LLM 번역이며 검증된 한국어 표준검사가 아님 — 실사용 전 재검수 권장. 라이선스는 원본을 따르되 번역은 파생물이므로 CC-SA/연구용 조건이 그대로 적용됨.
_meta.attribution: Open Extended Jungian Type Scales (OEJTS 1.2), Eric Jorgenson via openpsychometrics.org. CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (attribution + non-commercial + share-alike). · 한국어 번역: deepinme 번역 워크플로우(2026-07, LLM).
_meta.cautions: REFERENCE ONLY. The OEJTS *items* are CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (only openpsychometrics' raw response DATASETS are public domain, NOT the items). NonCommercial + ShareAlike make these UNSAFE to reproduce or rewrite in a commercial product without permission. Kept here for study of a directly-MBTI-mapped bipolar item design. For commercial authoring, base work on the public-domain IPIP set instead. | Design: 32 bipolar 5-point items; 8 per dichotomy; scored by summing per-dichotomy equations against thresholds. | 번역본: 문항 순서·채점방향(keyed)·factor/facet은 원본과 동일. text_en에 원문 병기.

translation.method: LLM faithful translation (deepinme workflow, 2026-07) — 충실 번역이며 '쉬운말 리라이팅'은 별도 단계
translation.status: working draft — NOT a validated Korean instrument

qa.reviewer_overall: A clean, high-quality set. All 32 items are present (ids 0-31), each preserving both poles of the bipolar construct and the self-report framing (statements in ~한다/~다 form). Fidelity is high across the board, including the trickier items (5 mechanical mind, 19 what-happened vs what-it-meant, 25 justice vs compassion, 26 yelling, 31 who/what/when vs why). Korean reads natural and idiomatic (미리미리, 바로바로 해치운다, 막판에, 신이 난다, 무던하다, 느긋하다) with no 번역투. The only notes are two very minor polish points (id 3 parallelism, id 30 'perform' nuance) that do not affect what the items measure. Recommend accept as-is or with the two optional touch-ups.

issues.problem: First pole adds "세상을" (the world) while the second pole uses "지금 상태" (current state); the English keeps "things"/"the way things are" parallel across both poles, so the referent drifts slightly between the two sides. Meaning is preserved but the parallelism is lost.
issues.suggestion: 있는 그대로 받아들인다 ↔ 지금 상태에 만족하지 못한다 (drop 세상을 so both poles reference the same subject)

issues.problem: "likes to perform in front of other people" is rendered as "사람들 앞에서 나서는 것을 좋아한다" (likes to put oneself forward/step up), which broadens away from the on-stage/entertain nuance of "perform." Fine for an extraversion item but slightly generic.
issues.suggestion: 사람들 앞에서 공연하거나 나서는 것을 좋아한다 ↔ 사람들 앞에서 말하는 것을 피한다 (optional; only if the performing nuance matters)

verification.summary: 번역 QA(2차 에이전트): fidelity=high, naturalness=natural, count_match=True, issues=2

sources.title: Korean translation (deepinme workflow)
sources.license: translation is a derivative; see reuse_notes

items.text: 목록을 작성한다 ↔ 기억에 의존한다
items.text_en: makes lists ↔ relies on memory
items.keyed: Q1, + in JP equation: left 'makes lists' = J, right 'relies on memory' = P

items.text: 회의적이다 ↔ 믿고 싶어 한다
items.text_en: sceptical ↔ wants to believe
items.keyed: Q2, − in FT equation: left 'sceptical' = T, right 'wants to believe' = F

items.text: 혼자 있는 시간을 지루해한다 ↔ 혼자 있는 시간이 필요하다
items.text_en: bored by time alone ↔ needs time alone
items.keyed: Q3, − in IE equation: left 'bored by time alone' = E, right 'needs time alone' = I

items.text: 세상을 있는 그대로 받아들인다 ↔ 지금 상태에 만족하지 못한다
items.text_en: accepts things as they are ↔ unsatisfied with the ways things are
items.keyed: Q4, + in SN equation: left 'accepts things as they are' = S, right 'unsatisfied with the ways things are' = N

items.text: 방을 깨끗하게 유지한다 ↔ 물건을 아무 데나 둔다
items.text_en: keeps a clean room ↔ just puts stuff where ever
items.keyed: Q5, + in JP equation: left 'keeps a clean room' = J, right 'just puts stuff where ever' = P

items.text: '로봇 같다'는 말을 모욕으로 여긴다 ↔ 기계처럼 사고하려고 애쓴다
items.text_en: thinks "robotic" is an insult ↔ strives to have a mechanical mind
items.keyed: Q6, + in FT equation: left 'thinks robotic is an insult' = F, right 'strives to have a mechanical mind' = T

items.text: 활기차다 ↔ 느긋하다
items.text_en: energetic ↔ mellow
items.keyed: Q7, − in IE equation: left 'energetic' = E, right 'mellow' = I

items.text: 객관식 시험을 선호한다 ↔ 서술형 답안을 선호한다
items.text_en: prefer to take multiple choice test ↔ prefer essay answers
items.keyed: Q8, + in SN equation: left 'prefer multiple choice test' = S, right 'prefer essay answers' = N

items.text: 무질서하다 ↔ 체계적이다
items.text_en: chaotic ↔ organized
items.keyed: Q9, − in JP equation: left 'chaotic' = P, right 'organized' = J

items.text: 쉽게 상처받는다 ↔ 무던하다
items.text_en: easily hurt ↔ thick-skinned
items.keyed: Q10, + in FT equation: left 'easily hurt' = F, right 'thick-skinned' = T

items.text: 여럿이 함께할 때 가장 능률이 오른다 ↔ 혼자일 때 가장 능률이 오른다
items.text_en: works best in groups ↔ works best alone
items.keyed: Q11, − in IE equation: left 'works best in groups' = E, right 'works best alone' = I

items.text: 현재에 집중한다 ↔ 미래에 집중한다
items.text_en: focused on the present ↔ focused on the future
items.keyed: Q12, + in SN equation: left 'focused on the present' = S, right 'focused on the future' = N

items.text: 미리미리 계획한다 ↔ 막판에 계획한다
items.text_en: plans far ahead ↔ plans at the last minute
items.keyed: Q13, + in JP equation: left 'plans far ahead' = J, right 'plans at the last minute' = P

items.text: 사람들의 존경을 원한다 ↔ 사람들의 사랑을 원한다
items.text_en: wants people's respect ↔ wants their love
items.keyed: Q14, − in FT equation: left 'wants people's respect' = T, right 'wants their love' = F

items.text: 파티에 가면 지친다 ↔ 파티에 가면 신이 난다
items.text_en: gets worn out by parties ↔ gets fired up by parties
items.keyed: Q15, + in IE equation: left 'gets worn out by parties' = I, right 'gets fired up by parties' = E

items.text: 무리에 잘 어우러진다 ↔ 눈에 띈다
items.text_en: fits in ↔ stands out
items.keyed: Q16, + in SN equation: left 'fits in' = S, right 'stands out' = N

items.text: 선택지를 열어 둔다 ↔ 하나에 전념한다
items.text_en: keeps options open ↔ commits
items.keyed: Q17, − in JP equation: left 'keeps options open' = P, right 'commits' = J

items.text: 물건을 잘 고치는 사람이 되고 싶다 ↔ 사람을 잘 고쳐 주는 사람이 되고 싶다
items.text_en: wants to be good at fixing things ↔ wants to be good at fixing people
items.keyed: Q18, − in FT equation: left 'fixing things' = T, right 'fixing people' = F

items.text: 말을 더 많이 한다 ↔ 더 많이 듣는다
items.text_en: talks more ↔ listens more
items.keyed: Q19, − in IE equation: left 'talks more' = E, right 'listens more' = I

items.text: 어떤 일을 이야기할 때 무슨 일이 있었는지를 전한다 ↔ 어떤 일을 이야기할 때 그 일이 어떤 의미였는지를 전한다
items.text_en: when describing an event, will tell people what happened ↔ when describing an event, will tell people what it meant
items.keyed: Q20, + in SN equation: left 'tell what happened' = S, right 'tell what it meant' = N

items.text: 할 일을 바로바로 해치운다 ↔ 일을 미룬다
items.text_en: gets work done right away ↔ procrastinates
items.keyed: Q21, + in JP equation: left 'gets work done right away' = J, right 'procrastinates' = P

items.text: 가슴이 시키는 대로 한다 ↔ 머리가 시키는 대로 한다
items.text_en: follows the heart ↔ follows the head
items.keyed: Q22, + in FT equation: left 'follows the heart' = F, right 'follows the head' = T

items.text: 집에 머문다 ↔ 밖으로 나가 논다
items.text_en: stays at home ↔ goes out on the town
items.keyed: Q23, + in IE equation: left 'stays at home' = I, right 'goes out on the town' = E

items.text: 큰 그림을 보고 싶어 한다 ↔ 세부 사항을 알고 싶어 한다
items.text_en: wants the big picture ↔ wants the details
items.keyed: Q24, − in SN equation: left 'wants the big picture' = N, right 'wants the details' = S

items.text: 즉흥적으로 한다 ↔ 미리 준비한다
items.text_en: improvises ↔ prepares
items.keyed: Q25, − in JP equation: left 'improvises' = P, right 'prepares' = J

items.text: 도덕의 기준을 정의에 둔다 ↔ 도덕의 기준을 연민에 둔다
items.text_en: bases morality on justice ↔ bases morality on compassion
items.keyed: Q26, − in FT equation: left 'bases morality on justice' = T, right 'bases morality on compassion' = F

items.text: 크게 소리치는 것을 어려워한다 ↔ 멀리 있는 사람을 큰 소리로 부르는 것이 자연스럽다
items.text_en: finds it difficult to yell very loudly ↔ yelling to others when they are far away comes naturally
items.keyed: Q27, + in IE equation: left 'finds it difficult to yell' = I, right 'yelling comes naturally' = E

items.text: 이론적이다 ↔ 경험적이다
items.text_en: theoretical ↔ empirical
items.keyed: Q28, − in SN equation: left 'theoretical' = N, right 'empirical' = S

items.text: 열심히 일한다 ↔ 열심히 논다
items.text_en: works hard ↔ plays hard
items.keyed: Q29, + in JP equation: left 'works hard' = J, right 'plays hard' = P

items.text: 감정을 불편해한다 ↔ 감정을 소중히 여긴다
items.text_en: uncomfortable with emotions ↔ values emotions
items.keyed: Q30, − in FT equation: left 'uncomfortable with emotions' = T, right 'values emotions' = F

items.text: 사람들 앞에서 나서는 것을 좋아한다 ↔ 사람들 앞에서 말하는 것을 피한다
items.text_en: likes to perform in front of other people ↔ avoids public speaking
items.keyed: Q31, − in IE equation: left 'likes to perform' = E, right 'avoids public speaking' = I

items.text: '누가?', '무엇을?', '언제?'를 알고 싶어 한다 ↔ '왜?'를 알고 싶어 한다
items.text_en: likes to know "who?", "what?", "when?" ↔ likes to know "why?"
items.keyed: Q32, + in SN equation: left 'likes to know who/what/when' = S, right 'likes to know why' = N
